name: Dimension Warrior
short_description: Dimension Warrior is an intense soulslike action adventure game in which you traverse various dimensions, facing powerful enemies in your quest to complete your dangerous mission and return to your own world. The core of the gameplay revolves around defeating powerful bosses.
detailed_description:
DEFEAT OPPONENTS FROM MULTIPLE DIMENSIONS OR PERISH TRYING

You have been chosen for a dangerous mission—many have fallen before you. Will you have the determination to complete it? We are counting on you.

Explore Diverse Dimensions

Each opponent has their own unique dimension. Will you be able to visit them all?

Combat System

Fight with a sword, block enemy attacks, or dodge them! Don't forget about healing, either. The combat system is inspired by Soulslike games but played from a first-person perspective.

Try to Survive Until the End

Face five challenging opponents, each with unique abilities. You'll have to learn their attack patterns and find their weaknesses to emerge victorious. If you die, you'll have to start your journey from the beginning...

Speedrun Mode

Try to complete the game as quickly as possible with the built-in time-tracking system. Of course, this is entirely optional.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Ukrainian
